subject: feat(admin): add extended station fields for bulk import
body:
Adds 9 new columns to stations table: suburb, province, loyalty_programs,
food_partners, convenience_partner, atm_banks, payment_methods,
truck_friendly, source_id. Updates bulk_insert_stations RPC, client-side
validation, and TypeScript types to support all fields. Province is
constrained to valid SA provinces. Amenities list expanded with 9 new
values (coffee_shop, bakery, truck_stop, ev_charging, etc).

Tags: admin, bulk-import, database, schema
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: bulk-import
Semver: minor
